user.title: Add a MEATER probe
user.description: Take the probe out of its charger and keep it within range of a Bluetooth adapter or proxy, then pick it below. If your probe isn't listed, wait a few seconds and try again — some probes only broadcast their name intermittently, so it may appear as a plain MAC address.

bluetooth_confirm.description:
Add **{name}** ({address}) — {manufacturer} {model}?

The probe will be read locally over Bluetooth. No cloud account required.
bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm MEATER probe

abort.dock: That's the MEATER charger/dock, not the probe. The dock can't be read directly. Take the probe out of the charger and it will be discovered on its own.
abort.no_devices_found: No Bluetooth devices found. Make sure the probe is out of its charger, turned on and within range of a Bluetooth adapter or proxy, then try again.
